summary: Spec review accepts the CORE-148 minimal suite for Stage 5 Core capability attribution and query facts.
reviewed_validation_summary: targeted core/api/schema/conformance tests, conformance smoke, typecheck, lint, git diff --check, suite validate, suite evidence validate, suite carrier validate, fact-chain, and verify passed locally.

follow_ups.summary: Lode output schema projection remains outside this batch and stays open.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec freezes Stage 5 user value, failure states, sensitive-data boundary, and non-goals without expanding into App UI truth, Harbor private evidence, Lode package truth, or Stage 6.

spec_review_disposition.reason: Minimal suite artifacts map directly to CORE-148 covered Work Items and explicitly exclude #151 and non-Core truth ownership.

carrier_only_drift.reason: Commits after the reviewed implementation head only update CORE-148 review/progress/status carrier metadata for v0.28 gate consumption.
